case_title: FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY VS. CRAIG EDWARD REECE

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT REECE, CRAIG EDWARD SR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-21-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-06-2007

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REECE, CRAIG EDWARD SR $4,696.63 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $563.20 INTEREST, $240.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,299.83, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
